name: Cinematic Short: Anthropomorphic toxic carnivorous plants in a past

inputs.prompt:
You are a film director planning a short film. Concept: "Anthropomorphic toxic carnivorous plants in a pastel brutalist reality tv villa. Flat planar camera angles, obsessive symmetry, deadpan expressions, mint green and powder pink decor. Polite domestic betrayal ending in a cryogenic freeze elimination.". Mood: whimsical macabre.
Plan exactly 5 scenes. For each scene, write a vivid image generation prompt (2-3 sentences) describing the visual.
Output ONLY a JSON array of strings, one prompt per scene. Example: ["scene 1 prompt", "scene 2 prompt"]

inputs.description: whimsical macabre visual style for a short film about: Anthropomorphic toxic carnivorous plants in a pastel brutalist reality tv villa. Flat planar camera angles, obsessive symmetry, deadpan expressions, mint green and powder pink decor. Polite domestic betrayal ending in a cryogenic freeze elimination.

data.workflowName: Cinematic Short: Anthropomorphic toxic carnivorous plants in a past

data.text: shot of a pastel brutalist living room with raw mint green concrete walls and powder pink geometric furniture. Three impeccably dressed
anthropomorphic Venus flytraps sit completely still on a modular sofa, staring directly at the camera with deadpan neutrality.

The flat, planar composition highlights a whimsical yet unsettling reality TV confessional setup.",
  "A flat, head-
on shot of an impossibly long powder pink dining table set against a stark mint green concrete wall. An elegant anthropomorphic
pitcher plant in a retro cardigan politely passes a silver sugar bowl to a sundew plant, both maintaining expressionless, un
blinking composure. The obsessive symmetry and soft pastel lighting mask the quiet, macabre tension of their domestic rivalry.",
"A tight, perfectly centered symmetrical shot of a pastel mint green brutalist kitchen counter where a tall pitcher plant gracefully
pours a steaming cup of tea. With a deadpan lack of emotion, it drops a glowing, toxic purple cube into
the powder pink teacup, orchestrating a quiet domestic betrayal. The flat, diorama-like camera angle emphasizes the

whimsical macabre atmosphere of the reality show.",
  "A highly symmetrical, planar wide shot of the reality TV elimination
room featuring glowing powder pink podiums against a towering mint green brutalist backdrop. The remaining anthropomorphic carnivorous plants stand rigidly
behind the podiums, their leafy heads cast downward in a polite but soulless display of faux-remorse.

The stark, whimsical macabre aesthetic is amplified by the flat, theatrical lighting and absolute geometric perfection.",
  "A
centered, flat-angle shot of a frosted glass cryogenic tube encased in a heavy powder pink brutalist frame. Inside,
the betrayed anthropomorphic sundew plant is frozen solid in a block of pale mint green ice, maintaining a perfectly deadpan
, frozen posture. The surviving plants stand symmetrically on either side of the chamber, politely clapping in a chilling, whimsically

values.text: glowing pastel sundew with manicured tentacles

smooth pastel concrete and frosted glass

powder pink confession room with hard shadows
frost slowly encasing a losing contestant
whimsical but deadly liquid nitrogen mist
a neatly arranged display of frozen victims
polite applause during a chilling execution
hidden venom dripping on pastel carpet
a sterile emotionless reality show exit
